calendar.matters:
El Camino Hospitals Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Portions Of Exhibit 1 A Tt Ached To Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: RESPONDENT EL CAMINO HOSPITAL El Camino Hospitals' Motion To Seal Portions Of Exhibit 1 Attached To Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed, and the motion complies with California Rules of Court, Rules 2.550 and 2.551. The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.

Single order as to both motions to seal signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Kaiser Foundation Health Plan, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Portions Of Exhibit 1 Attached To Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Nov-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC.'s Motion To Seal Portions Of Exhibit 1 Attached To Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed, and the motion complies with California Rules of Court, Rules 2.550 and 2.551. The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.

Single order as to both motions to seal signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
